title: Shiny Players (Emissive Textures)
description: A Resourcepack for Making Players Shiny!
body:
A resourcepack for making you textures shiny! (aka to make them glow in the dark)

**!! Texturepack will not be added to newer versions, because of the changes to core shaders, unless i find a way to update it !!**

**It works on Vanilla, Sodium and Entity Features mod!** Use cases included but not limited to: - Making your eyes glow! - Making your CRT monitor display _glow_ - Making your halo glow! - Making your eyes glow! - Making yourself glow constantly so you can blind your opponents! (if they have the resourcepack) - Making your eyes glow! Tutorial for making skin _shiny_ : [Github Wiki](https://github.com/LevAlTru/shiny-players/wiki/Guide-how-to-skin) ### Mini-gallery: ![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8d56296d-0efc-49e3-a3d2-eb66fbc22635)

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1b97a1ec-4a52-49a8-8135-96e7b30250a0)
